name: Formatted text
description: Renders csv/md/html as safe, minimal, semantic HTML via text-extractor — the sibling of formatted-document/renderer.json, covering the subset of that same extractor's supported formats that file-type finds no binary signature for (confirmed empirically: detectMime() returns null for all three, so the content sniff decides and finds them textual), making file_mode "text" here rather than "binary". Same tab name, same underlying extractor as formatted-document — this manifest exists only because of the existing text-vs-binary classification split, not because these formats render any differently.
